# VentureInKorea Embed Widget

> Embeddable VentureInKorea widgets for any website. Zero dependencies, Shadow DOM isolation, 4 themes (light/dark/sepia/auto).

## Quick Start

Add to any HTML page:
- Script: <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/ventureinkorea-embed@1/dist/embed.min.js"></script>

## Links

- Main site: https://ventureinkorea.com
- Widget docs: https://widget.ventureinkorea.com
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/ventureinkorea-embed
- GitHub: https://github.com/dobestan/ventureinkorea-embed
- API: https://ventureinkorea.com/developers/

## Standalone Widget Family

- [ReadWhitepaper Widget](https://widget.readwhitepaper.com)
- [CryptoLogo Widget](https://widget.crypto-logo.com)

## Part of FYIPedia

Open-source developer tools ecosystem — https://fyipedia.com
